name: Stuffed Green Peppers
recipeIngredient: 3 large Green peppers - cut in half lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pepper halves in a shallow 3-quart microproof baking dish. Cover and cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 4 minutes.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the beef, rice, seasonings, egg, and 1/2 cup tomato sauce. Mix well.
3. Mound the beef mixture into each pepper half. Cover again and cook on HIGH for another 10 minutes, rotating the dish once during cooking.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining tomato sauce with the beef bouillon granules. Pour this mixture evenly over the stuffed peppers.
5. Cook uncovered on HIGH for an additional 5 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
6. Garnish with grated Parmesan cheese, if desired.
Each serving provides:
325 calories
22.0 g protein
16.7 g fat
21.2 g carbohydrate
994 mg sodium
117 mg cholesterol
Source: MICROCOOKING WITH RICE
